_NOTE: REAL opener (match 1). Stats are best-effort illustrative placeholders until WC.csv exists — flagged per beat with verify:true. data_complete=false until verified against WC.csv.

text.headline: MEXICO 🇲🇽 vs 🇿🇦 SOUTH AFRICA
text.sub: The World Cup begins · Estadio Azteca · June 11

stat.teaser: The first match of WC26 — and the Azteca's record 3rd World Cup opener.

text.headline: THEY'VE DONE THIS BEFORE
text.sub: 2010 World Cup OPENER: Mexico 1–1 South Africa

stat.note: These two opened the 2010 World Cup — Tshabalala's iconic goal, Márquez equalised. Now they open 2026. Mexico's 17th finals vs South Africa's 4th.

text.headline: MOST WORLD CUP GOALS — ALL TIME

stat.note: Mexico ~60 across 16 tournaments; South Africa ~11 across 3. The gap IS the story.

team_a_player.name: Santiago Giménez
team_a_player.headline: Mexico's #9 — leads the line on home soil

team_b_player.name: Lyle Foster
team_b_player.headline: South Africa's spearhead — Premier League pedigree

text.headline: WHAT TO EXPECT
text.sub: Mexico best: QF (1970, 1986) · South Africa best: Group stage

stat.prediction_frame: Mexico have reached 7 straight Round of 16s and open at home; South Africa, back after 16 years, chase a first WC knockout berth.
